connected_candidates: Fault-Injection Replay extends trust flow replay by deliberately injecting low-confidence agent handoffs, tool timeouts, and partial context loss to stress-test fallback logic and rollback pathways, so reliability engineers can uncover brittle failure cascades and verify graceful state recovery before deployment.

Interaction Affordance Audit: It automatically scans every agent-to-user touchpoint in a simulated multi-agent workflow, flagging ambiguous prompts, missing confirmations, and unclear progress indicators, so product designers can refine interaction patterns to eliminate user friction and build trustworthy, seamless experiences before deployment.

Boundary Overlay maps each agent’s tool privileges against data-sensitivity labels and the coverage matrix, flagging violations where a lower-trust agent would access protected resources, enabling security reviewers to enforce least privilege and generate a pre‑deployment audit log of every justified boundary crossing.

Intent Drift Simulator: Injects tailored prompt variations into recorded multi-agent dialogues to expose where subtle paraphrasing causes intent misinterpretation, then generates contrastive replay pairs to sharpen agents' durable comprehension; this lets learning scientists iteratively harden prompts and handoff logic until the workflow demonstrates consistent, transferable understanding under stress.

Budget Guardrails injects per-agent token caps and latency timeouts into trace replay, surfacing any handoff that breaches cost or delay ceilings so cost analysts can preempt budget overruns before deployment.
isolated_candidates: Resilience Dry‑Run replays recorded multi‑agent traces while injecting simulated agent crashes, timeouts, and malformed handoff payloads to surface unhandled exceptions and verify that every handoff triggers a validated rollback, giving reliability engineers a pre‑deployment guarantee of graceful degradation.

Friction Trace replays a multi-agent conversation as an interactive timeline that highlights where agents stalled, repeated prompts, or misread handoffs, letting designers quickly identify and remove interaction friction before deployment.

Sensitive Data Tracer automatically instruments multi-agent communications during dry-run replays to tag sensitivity levels and alerts security reviewers to any cross-boundary transfer of PII or secrets that violates declared privacy policies, providing an auditable map of unauthorized data disclosure before deployment.

Coordination Critique inserts a reflective critic agent into dry-run replays to analyze inter-agent communication failures, generating natural‑language explanations and suggested prompt or contract adjustments. This creates a tight feedback loop that helps developers rapidly improve coordination and build durable understanding of failure modes before deployment.

Budget-Constrained Throughput Simulator iteratively replays multi-agent workflows, automatically throttling concurrency or substituting lower-cost models when token expenditure risks breaching a defined budget or latency SLA, to deliver a deployment configuration that maximizes throughput within cost and performance limits.
